description: Use this API to calculate transmission interchange limits using a linear network (dc) model. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = spil(options, values, labels, dfxfile, prtfile)
python_syntax: ierr = spil(options, values, labels, dfxfile, prtfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of sixteen elements specifying calculation and reporting options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying tolerances and thresholds. (input).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying subsystem and interface labels. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of dfax data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: prtfile
parameters.description: Name of subsystem participation data file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

options.description: base case rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
contingency case rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
base case line flow code (0 by default).
locked in base case shift solutions.
regulating in base case shift solutions.
list study system buses (0 by default).
list opposing system buses (0 by default).
list study system tie lines (0 by default).
add study system tie lines to monitored line list (0 by default).
apply summary minimum distribution factor, VALUES(4), to solution reports (0 by default).
convert MVA ratings to estimated MW ratings (0 by default).
code to discontinue activity if MW mismatch exceeds VALUES(1) (0 by default).
summary table contingency descriptions (1 by default).
number of elements to include in flow tables (60000 by default).
summary table maximum times for reporting the same element (5 by default).

values.description: required MW mismatch tolerance for continuing (Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).
percent of rating for reporting an element as overloaded (100.0 by default).
summary table maximum import or export (>0.) (99999.0 by default).
summary table minimum distribution factor magnitude (0.0 by default).
minimum contingency case pre-shift flow change (0.0 by default).
minimum contingency case distribution factor change (0.0 by default).
study system generation shift (100.0 by default).

labels.description: interface label for optional interface limits summary table (blank for none) (blank by default).
interface label for optional interface limits summary table (blank for none) (blank by default).
interface label for optional interface limits summary table (blank for none) (blank by default).
interface label for optional interface limits summary table (blank for none) (blank by default).
interface label for optional interface limits summary table (blank for none) (blank by default).
interface label for optional interface limits summary table (blank for none) (blank by default).

error_codes.description: same label specified for study and opposing systems.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
file DFXFILE does not contain distribution factors; run DFAX with distribution factor option enabled.
no monitored branches or interfaces defined.
no in-service buses in subsystem WORLD.
no tie lines from study system.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
